title: Operate a dairy waste utilisation system
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate a dairy waste utilisation system demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for dairy waste utilisation operations

pcs.text: Confirm maintenance requirements for dairy waste utilisation operations to be undertaken from work program and food safety plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm maintenance requirements for dairy waste utilisation operations to be undertaken from work program and food safety plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm maintenance requirements for dairy waste utilisation operations to be undertaken from work program and food safety plan.

pcs.text: Communicate and coordinate activities with other workers who may be affected by maintenance activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate and coordinate activities with other workers who may be affected by maintenance activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate and coordinate activities with other workers who may be affected by maintenance activities.

pcs.text: Identify work health and safety hazards, assess risks and determine control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work health and safety hazards, assess risks and determine control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work health and safety hazards, assess risks and determine control measures.

pcs.text: Select, check and prepare personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and prepare personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and prepare personal protective equipment (PPE).

pcs.text: Select, check and prepare tools and equipment according to work requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and prepare tools and equipment according to work requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and prepare tools and equipment according to work requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for dairy waste utilisation operations

elements.title: Maintain and operate system

pcs.text: Service and maintain dairy waste removal and disposal equipment according to manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Service and maintain dairy waste removal and disposal equipment according to manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Service and maintain dairy waste removal and disposal equipment according to manufacturer specifications.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out irrigation from dairy waste storages.

pcs.text: Remove litter, flush and drain in-shed dairy waste pits

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove litter, flush and drain in-shed dairy waste pits.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain tools' condition and storage location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain tools' condition and storage location.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Maintain and operate system

elements.title: Monitor waste utilisation system

pcs.text: Check flow rates, pit levels and equipment to maintain effective operation of the system

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check flow rates, pit levels and equipment to maintain effective operation of the system.

pcs.text: Carry out cleaning procedures and hygiene practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out cleaning procedures and hygiene practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out cleaning procedures and hygiene practices.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental impact of dairy waste disposal, assess likely outcomes and take responsive action in line with workplace environmental, legislative and regulatory requirements.
